fields.description: Snake_case skill identifier (e.g. 'crm_agent', 'lead_enricher'). Use '*' as a wildcard that matches any skill.
fields.label: Skill

fields.description: Action keyword (e.g. 'enrich', 'stage_move', 'send_email'). Must match the action passed to is_action_allowed().
fields.label: Action

fields.description: Minimum autonomy level (0-4) required to perform this action. 0=observe, 1=suggest, 2=enrich, 3=stage_move, 4=autonomous.
fields.label: Min Autonomy Level

fields.description: If checked, action is allowed but audit log entry gets escalation=1 for downstream approval workflows. In v0.3, this triggers a LangGraph interrupt() with Approve/Reject buttons in the Raven channel.
fields.label: Require Human Approval

fields.description: If checked, action is always blocked regardless of autonomy level. Use for compliance holds or temporary kill-switches.
fields.label: Blocked

fields.description: Operator notes — why this policy exists, who approved it, related ticket numbers.
fields.label: Notes
